verdict_reason: KD 29 with no AI Overview. SERP is 100% small sites and open source projects (apxml.com, huggingface.co, github.com, smcleod.net, vram.asmirnov.xyz). Reddit and HN both rank = massive content gap. Vol 110 for head term but 'VRAM calculator games' and 'VRAM calculator LLM' expand the cluster. Reddit r/LocalLLaMA has constant VRAM questions (3 tool requests in demand mining). AI/GPU hobbyist niche is growing fast. CPC $0 currently but GPU affiliate potential is huge.

signal.raw_text: I built a VRAM Calculator for the 50-series GPUs because I was tired of OOM errors

serp_analysis.opportunity_note: Every single top result is a small site or open source tool. Reddit AND HN both rank. This is a pure blue ocean for a well-built tool. Related searches show demand spans gaming, LLM, VRChat, and Unity - multiple entry points for content.

reddit_demand.key_insight: LocalLLaMA users constantly ask 'can my GPU run this model?' and 'how much VRAM do I need for X'. Existing calculators are basic and don't cover latest models.

build_approach: Comprehensive VRAM calculator covering: LLM models (with quantization), gaming, VRChat, Unity. Database of GPU specs + model requirements. SEO via model-specific pages ('how much VRAM for Llama 3 70B'). Monetize via GPU affiliate links.
